title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 178.330 - Attendance counted as part of employment time
text:
178.330.  Attendance counted as part of employment time. — The attendance of the part-time school, department or class shall be counted as a part of the time the minor can be employed.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 13-33) 
(Source: RSMo 1959 § 162.230) 
Hours of work for minors, 294.030
